Overall Itinerary

A practical route at a glance

Core stops are grouped to reduce unnecessary transfers and keep enough time for food, photos and rest.

DayRouteRecommended Area to StayFood IdeasTypical Transfer
Day 1Zhengzhou / Dengfeng arrival → Shaolin Temple → Pagoda Forest → martial-arts show or booked beginner classDengfengShaolin vegetarian dishes, hui mian, sesame cakes1.5–2 h from Zhengzhou to Dengfeng
Day 2Dengfeng → Fuxi Mountain scenic area → optional Love Sky Ladder → Zhengzhou departure—Hu la tang, stewed noodles, local snacksAbout 1.5–2.5 h depending on route and traffic
Travel Tips

Prepare before you start

Keep these practical points in mind before following the route.

💳

Payment

Set up Alipay or WeChat Pay before arrival and carry a small amount of RMB as backup.

📶

Internet

Prepare an eSIM or international roaming for maps, translation, ride-hailing and mobile payment.

👥

Crowds

Do not recreate crowd-chasing or unsafe livestream behavior. Add buffer time at popular sites.

🌃

Night Views

Mountain weather can change quickly. Avoid high-altitude features in rain, strong wind or poor visibility.

🎟️

Tickets

Use official attraction channels, WeChat mini programs, Trip.com or on-site service desks. Reconfirm opening hours before travel.

🛎️

Hotel Check-In

Book with the exact passport name and carry the original passport.
